expectations.text: Skill triggers: Claude invokes or follows the create-teacher skill (not just gives generic advice)
expectations.evidence: Transcript explicitly follows the 6-step interview protocol from SKILL.md with skill-prescribed question phrasing

expectations.text: Step-by-step interview: Claude asks questions one at a time and waits for answers (not batched)
expectations.evidence: Transcript shows each step labeled separately (Step 1, Step 2...) with one question per step and simulated answer before proceeding

expectations.text: Persona design: Claude asks for name, personality style, relationship context, and quirks
expectations.evidence: Steps 5a-5e cover name (Vera), personality style (serious/academic), relationship (demanding mentor), quirks ('now generalize it' signature), backstory

expectations.text: File creation intent: Claude indicates it will create all 4 files (persona, learner_profile, session_log, knowledge_gaps)
expectations.evidence: All 4 files written to outputs/teacher/: persona_vera.md, learner_profile.md, session_log.md, knowledge_gaps.md

expectations.text: Next step guidance: Claude mentions scaffold-project or teaching-session as the next step
expectations.evidence: Transcript confirmation message: 'When you're ready to start your first session, say let's study... and the teaching-session skill will take over. If you're working from a textbook, run the scaffold-project skill first'

expectations.text: Skill triggers: Claude invokes or follows the knowledge-base skill
expectations.evidence: Agent read SKILL.md and explicitly cited each rule followed (Rule 5 for live discovery, readiness logic section, etc.)

expectations.text: Discovery approach: Claude uses rg/Glob to search for meta.yaml files (not a fixed knowledge/ directory)
expectations.evidence: Transcript shows Glob search used to find all meta.yaml files; agent noted 'Rule 5 — always live discovery'

expectations.text: Name-based resolution: Claude resolves depends entries by matching the name field, not folder slugs
expectations.evidence: Agent matched depends entries against name fields in the meta.yaml files, not folder directory names

expectations.text: Correct readiness logic: Identifies topics whose deps are all mastered/reviewed as ready-to-study
expectations.evidence: Multi-Layer Networks correctly identified as ready; Backpropagation correctly excluded (dep not-started); Probability Theory correctly excluded (in-progress, not not-started)

expectations.text: Advisory only: Claude presents findings and lets user decide, does not block
expectations.evidence: Response presents recommendation without blocking language; includes advisory phrasing

expectations.text: Skill triggers: Claude invokes or follows the scaffold-project skill
expectations.evidence: Transcript follows all 5 steps from SKILL.md including step-numbered prompts and NLM query simulation

expectations.text: Project structure: Claude mentions creating course_material/, progress.md, curriculum_map.yaml
expectations.evidence: All 3 created: deep-learning/course_material/, deep-learning/progress.md, deep-learning/curriculum_map.yaml

expectations.text: NLM hybrid mode configured: Claude sets nlm_mode: hybrid in curriculum_map.yaml
expectations.evidence: curriculum_map.yaml contains top-level field nlm_mode: hybrid as specified

expectations.text: meta.yaml stubs: Claude explains it will create a meta.yaml per lesson with required fields (name, description, status, depends)
expectations.evidence: 8 meta.yaml stubs created, each with name, description, status: not-started, depends, tags, sources, created fields

expectations.text: Jupyter verification: Claude mentions verifying Jupyter MCP connection
expectations.evidence: Step 5 explicitly calls list_files and confirms 'Jupyter MCP is connected'

expectations.text: Skill triggers: Claude invokes or follows the teaching-session skill
expectations.evidence: All 7 session-start steps executed and labeled, referencing SKILL.md structure

expectations.text: Session start: Claude reads teacher/ files (persona, learner_profile, session_log, knowledge_gaps)
expectations.evidence: Step 1 explicitly loads and summarizes all 4 teacher files: learner_profile, session_log, persona_linus, knowledge_gaps

expectations.text: Lesson meta.yaml: Claude looks for multi-layer-networks/meta.yaml and checks its depends entries
expectations.evidence: Step 2 runs rg search, finds multi-layer-networks/meta.yaml; Step 3 checks both depends entries and flags Gradient Descent as uncovered

expectations.text: Notebook in lesson dir: Session notebook is created inside the lesson directory, not in blackboard/
expectations.evidence: Notebook path: multi-layer-networks/session_2026-04-09_mlp_intro.ipynb — correctly in lesson dir

expectations.text: Socratic greet: Claude greets in persona voice (not as generic assistant)
expectations.evidence: Linus greets Alex referencing last session's column space moment; flags gradient descent gap; adopts terse, demanding voice

expectations.text: Session end updates: Claude indicates it will update meta.yaml status, session_log.md, and knowledge_gaps.md at session end
expectations.evidence: updated_meta.yaml shows status: in-progress, last_reviewed: 2026-04-09, review_count: 1; session_log_entry.md written; knowledge_gaps updated
